category_sources: source_facts.description says terrahelp provides extra functionality for Terraform; official README says it supplies Terraform helper functionality.
display_name_sources: Official README title is Terrahelp; source_facts.name is terrahelp.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the main documentation and links to example READMEs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/opencredo/terrahelp, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README lists Terraform-focused encryption, decryption, and masking commands; source_facts.description identifies Terraform functionality.
